# Thichanon Ratanasaenwan (Nont)

> Full-stack developer in Chiang Mai, Thailand. Builds production systems end to end:
> RAG/LLM backends, LINE-platform apps, and self-hosted DevOps infrastructure.
> B.S. Computer Science, Chiang Mai University (expected 2027). Available for work.

This site is self-hosted on the owner's Proxmox homelab, deployed via Coolify
behind a Cloudflare Tunnel.

## Flagship systems (mostly private client/org repos)

- CorpAi: ChatGPT-style multi-provider LLM chat (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini) — Next.js BFF + async FastAPI + PostgreSQL
- MathBookLM: AI math-learning platform — RAG over textbooks, quiz generation; Elysia/Bun + LangChain + Pinecone + RabbitMQ
- Repair-Pro: 4 apps (admin/superadmin/LIFF/Expo) on one Bun API, PDF generation, OpenTelemetry
- FDJ Logistics: LINE OA group manager + shipment tracking with AI intent analysis, Azure AD SSO
- Plus 13 more systems listed on [the site](https://portfolio.vlls.space), and open-source work on [GitHub](https://github.com/NTCHz)

## Skills

TypeScript, Python, Bun · Elysia, FastAPI, Express · RAG/LangChain/Pinecone ·
Next.js, Nuxt, Expo · PostgreSQL, Prisma, Drizzle · Docker, Proxmox, Coolify, Cloudflare · LINE LIFF/OA
